name: Loki - Christmas 🎄
description:
Christmas special! 💫

⚠️ the icon is not mine

Either Loki is your gift, or you are Loki's gift.

"All I want for Christmas is you, baby"

The second option came as a result of a comment from last year. (Sorry for taking so long to do it).

I'm from Brazil, sorry for any mistakes in English.

I hope you enjoy it.

tags?: Marvel, Avengers, Loki Laufeyson, Loki Odinson, God of Mischief.
